clusters.justification: These terms share robust co-activation across limbic and paralimbic cortical systems, representing the broad functional axis of generating, experiencing, and regulating emotional valence.
This cluster maps onto frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitries that collectively drive the macroscopic computation of expected utility, goal-directed motivation, and cost-benefit integration.

These concepts consistently co-activate the core subsystems of the default mode network, reflecting a high-level functional domain dedicated to internally-directed processing of interpersonal and self-referential representations.
